summary: Started Spring Boot backend via scripts/start-backend.ps1. Tomcat is running on port 8096 and AuctionApplication started successfully. Frontend was already running on localhost:3000 from the previous turn.
current_status: Full local dev stack is up: frontend http://localhost:3000, backend http://localhost:8096. Payment strike DB columns will migrate on startup via DataSeeder when app.seed.enabled=true.
